concerns: Listener binds :9020 on all host interfaces with host networking — not localhost-only. tsnet must constrain /v1/* to tsnet-only when enabled.
GitHub/Slack receivers already have webhook signature auth — tsnet adds no value for them. Removed from scope.
MCP bridge exists in code but is not deployed in Pulumi infra — tsnet for MCP is conditional on deployment.
NATS containers use bridge networking and cannot resolve MagicDNS. Switching to host networking resolves this but requires host port availability checks.
packages/envoy/docs/constraints.md says 'Use Tailscale IPs' — must be updated as part of #310.
tsnet state directories must be unique per service to avoid Tailscale identity collisions.
Tailscale auth key only needed for initial registration; state persistence across restarts avoids re-auth.
